reviews.text: I can't rate Gutter and Roof Repairs highly enough. Great work from start to finish. Really clear communication, friendly service and great workmanship. Nothing was too much trouble and Jason and the team were lovely to deal with.

We needed a section of guttering, and its supporting spikes, replaced along perhaps half the length of the house on one side. The guttering is about five metres above the ground, so it was hard to get anyone to attempt it. One company did and gave up because our mains electrical connection was adjacent to the work.
Subsequently only two other companies quoted. One would only do the whole house but Gutter and Roof Repairs quoted only for what we wanted.
The quote was comprehensive and a reasonable price. When we accepted, they were very busy at that time, so they committed to giving us an expected timeframe when they could. In due course they gave us the expected timeframe, then later the exact date. On the working day before that date the guttering arrived with the spikes and a man came who made the electrical connection safe to work next to. On the day the team arrived and completed the job within the times promised and then disappeared leaving everything perfectly done and no mess. The whole process was businesslike and professional. I cannot imagine a better experience.

Fantastic experience from start to finish! We had new gutters installed, and the process couldn’t have gone smoother. The team kept us updated every step of the way, arrived right on schedule, and did a brilliant job.

Everyone was friendly, cheerful, and easy to talk to — and they cleaned up perfectly when they were done. Couldn’t be happier with the result. Highly recommend!

When you need something like gutter repairs, it comes down to a few basics: you want the process to be simple, done properly, and not cost a fortune. Gutter and Roof Repairs gets it, and in my experience, they nail all three.

I sent a quick inquiry online and was impressed with how fast they got back to me. One of their team members showed a week later for a free, no-obligation quote - none of that “pay us just to take a look” nonsense you get from some companies.

Sid showed up - a team member  who approached gutters with the kind of precise, practiced confidence you don’t question. He checked out the gutter, explained the problem, and walked me through what needed to be done. He was upfront about everything, which was reassuring, and the quote was fair enough to make it an easy yes.

A few weeks later - sooner than I expected, given the holiday rush and rainy season - the repair crew arrived. Matt, Feng, and Brendan worked like a well-oiled machine: professional, efficient, and focused. When they ran into an unforeseen issue - a misaligned gutter needing a slope correction - they handled it smoothly. They didn’t grumble. They didn’t cut corners. Instead, they explained the problem, got my approval to revise the scope of the job, and stayed on longer than planned to resolve the issue without any fuss, all for a fair update to the original price.

Throughout the process, the team was courteous, thorough, and committed to getting it right. Gutter and Roof Repairs is the kind of service you can count on: professional, reliable, and refreshingly straightforward. If you need work done on your roof or gutters, they’re an easy recommendation.

Jason and the boys
Turned up on time to the day promised and completed the work to a high standard
They kept the site clean and safe.
Jason was very helpful during the quote and design process and the office polite and professional with contracts and invoices
Highly recommend gutter and roof repairs to everyone.

We have used Gutter and Roof Repairs twice now and find their work to be exceptional. We have a two-story house on a fairly steep block where access limited. They have replaced damaged guttering  to a high standard and cleaned up the job site thoroughly afterwards. The team obviously takes pride in doing a good job once. Communication from the office and team members is professional and prompt. We highly recommend this company to other homeowners that require fixes to their guttering and roofing problems.

Highly recommend Gutter and Roof Repairs due to the professional service provided and work done in restoring our tiled roof. With good weather provided the roof was repaired where required and restored to above expectations (see attached Before and After photos). They are a professional Roof and Gutter repair business who provide a Master Builders Queensland Minor Works Contract if required for the job size and recommend you contact them for any roof work required.
We were very pleased with the process, overall workmanship and professionalism shown by the team to complete our gutter replacement in the timeframe agreed.

Engaged Gutter and Roof Repairs to repair a leaking roof vent pipe and install a whirlybird. When the team came to inspect the job to quote they put a temporary seal on the vent pipe at no cost, to stop it leaking until the job could be booked in. They offered good advice on the job and were easy to book, arriving on time to do the final work. Professional, friendly team installed the new dektite and whirlybird, photos and videos were provided with the final invoice. Really happy with the finished job and price. Thanks so much, highly recommend business.
Highly recommend Gutter and Roof Repairs. We have used them on numerous jobs across the rent roll we manage. They are efficient and well priced.
Highly recommend for any job large or small. The whole crew was great from start to finish. I have a complex roof with lots of pitches but nothing was too much trouble.

We would rate this company highly. The service provided was excellent. The company consulted both on and off site with prompt communication. The crew notified us prior to time and arrived on date advised and on time to complete the job efficiently. Detailed invoices were provided in a timely manner to allow us to communicate with our insurance company.

Was recommended Gutter and roof repairs. Very happy with the work completed in replacing some gutters and rood sheets. Prompt with quoting and communicated well when the work would be undertaken.   We also appreciated receiving photos of the completed work.Would recommend.

They did the job over 2 days and handled the awkward terrain around my house very well without any damage. Gutters look good and I appreciated that they painted my fascia and re-installed my leaf guard as well. Recommended.

Complements to the crew that worked on our guttering.  They were courteous, tidy and worked well together.  In preparing the quote G&RR actually got on the roof.  Great communication from office kept us in the loop.  We recommend Gutter and Roof Repairs to others.
Friendly, fast communication with updates. Appreciate the team’s timely manner and follow up with repairing our roof repairs. Highly recommended.

I recently had my roof restored by Gutter and Roof Repairs, and I couldn’t be happier with the results! From start to finish, the entire process was smooth and professional. The team replaced damaged tiles, re-pointed the entire roof, and gave it a fresh coat of paint that completely transformed the look of my home.

Their attention to detail and workmanship were outstanding, and they took great care to ensure everything was done to the highest standard. The crew was friendly and left everything clean and tidy after the job was done.

My roof looks brand new, and I’ve already received compliments from neighbours. I highly recommend.

Very impressed by the professionalism, experience and quality of work done by Jason and his team. Cannot fault this business - from arriving on time to quote to taking time to explain work recommended to resolve our roof leak and finishing with a quality job that has been more than tested by a very very wet Brisbane season that included cyclone Alfred! I found this business via a chance spotting of a work vehicle in the neighborhood, so very happy to add some certainty to anyone looking for roof work to be done by wholeheartedly recommending Gutter & Roof Repairs. The peace of mind that comes from no longer worrying about roof leaking every time it storms cannot be overrated!

Gutter and Roof were recommended to me and I am extremely happy with the repairs.
Communication from Admin and the onsite tradesmen was excellent. The work to be done was explained fully to me and I felt that the quote for the job was honest and reasonable for the scope of work that was done. Highly recommend.

I would highly recommend Gutter and Roof Repairs.  Jason came out to inspect our roof and provided a quick turnaround of a reasonable quote.  We were fortunate that the roof could be prepared just prior to the cyclone and even though it's a 70 year old roof there wasn't one leak.  Very impressed with the service and cost.  Thanks Gutter and Roof Repairs!

Highly recommend Gutter and Roof Repairs. From their quote to installation, all stages were handled professionally by the office and installation teams. The standard of workmanship is excellent. Very happy with the whole job.

Gutter and Roofing Repairs were prompt and responsive. The arrived on time and provided good communication regarding the job. They fixed our gutters colour matching them to the existing gutters which look great. They also took away the old guttering and materials leaving the site clean and tidy when the job was finished.   I would definitely use them again and recommend them to others.
Great communication. Punctual. The team were super professional and did a fantastic job. Our new gutters look perfect and they left our yard tidy. I 100 percent recommend.

Service was excellent! There was clear communication prior to the event with regards to what was going to happen and what I needed to do to prepare. The staff readily answered my email queries. The two gentlemen that arrived to repair my gutter were lovely, polite and efficient. They also included photos of what they did so I could see the repair work. Thanks so much! I will definitely be in touch for future work!

I experienced roofing leakage during Cyclone Alfred. Gutter and Roof Repairs helped and resolved my issue without any hassle.  I’m satisfied with their roofing repair service. So, I highly suggest hiring them for their reliable and trustworthy roofing services.

Very impressed with the young team from Gutter & Roof Repairs who came to work on front guttering and sky light on my roof today. Found them to be both courteous and professional.
From Jason who first came to give me a quote, to the office staff I chatted with on the phone, all I can say is a big 'Thank you'.
I have no hesitation in recommending their services.

These guys charged me over $25K for a job that I am now told was not more than 12K of work.  My roof leaks worse than it did before they touched it.  Their guttering was shoddy with not enough attachments so it was all sagging and holding water in the fall to the tank.  The new downpipes they installed to run out onto the ground because they don't dig - but failed to mention that.  Terrible.
The Gutter and Roof Repairs team did a great job of replacing my rusted guttering in a thorough and timely manner.  I am very pleased with the outcome and would recommend them to you wholeheartedly.
I would recommend these guys anytime, on time, worked professionally, cleaned up after job. Followed up Kept the communication flowing and prompt
Great communication, job done ahead of schedule! Lovely people to deal with!! I would recommend them to anyone!

Absolute nightmare, do not waste your time with this business. Tried to get a quote, called and got booked in, heard nothing back, then called them back and they forgot to send the email confirmation. Then they changed the day from Wednesday to a Monday and upon query advised they again communicated the incorrect details and that I’d have to wait another week despite all the runaround. No thanks, I’ll take my business elsewhere!

In response to reply from Jason:
Thanks Jason, please don’t insinuate that you were doing me a favour by bringing the ‘free quote’ forward. Your business provided email confirmation of Wednesday. I’d also rearranged my week around the confirmed quote time and day, what was the point of having you turn up when no one was home? I can appreciate mistakes happen, but the whole process really just became very complicated. I also asked that you call me yesterday so that we could resolve the matter - it’s absurd that you chose not to do this.

Furthermore, I’m quite comfortable with the conversations I had yesterday, they were cordial, but you’re right I did point out that your business had really given me the runaround. If you are too busy to quote for work, please don’t accept quotes and send email confirmations that you are not able to honour, it’s just a waste of everyone’s time.

Wishing you well, and a Merry Christmas.

From the initial inquiry and the fast turn around of a quote the team were great. Upon booking in a date for the work they were very responsive and keep me updated. The guys on site were great, completed the job and left the place like they found it. Very happy with the team, their workmanship and the job they did. Any future roof or gutter jobs I will be getting them to do it. Would highly recommend

Last week they came in to clean gutters and left a big mess behind. Not mentioning he didn't even had a working blower, so I offered mine.
He got his blower going and blew leaves off the roof and that was it. He called it a day.

Today they came to clean the gutter at the back of the house....he managed to clean 2m only.
Very poor quality and not professional job at all.
They boss came to look at it and was very rude explaining me that they cleaned the gutters and and my eyes are wrong. He told me to go up to the high roof with him....so I took extra photos after he left....

Gutter and Roof repairs provided us with 100% professional work standard on our gutter replacement and excellent advice before the works commenced. We now have a residence which will be easier to insure than it was last year.
Excellent service, gutters look great. Fast and efficient installation - the team had the old gutters off and new ones on our big home & verandahs in two days. Thanks Team!

A great professional team to deal with. I needed some repointing done and water leaks fixed in my tiled roof. The team from Gutter and Roof Repairs were friendly, professional and their workmanship was flawless.
We have used Gutter and Roof repairs for several years and always been pleased

Excellent service - great communication, friendly. I really like how they photographed the roof so I could see what needed to be done and then afterwards more photos so I could see the work that had been done. Clear quote for job. The young guys did the job with no fuss. I would highly recommend these guys. Body Corp committed member, Mary Tucker. Taringa.
I found Gutter and Roof repairs very professional in all my dealings with their staff, and we are very happy with the quality of the work done

Great service again and long-term gutter leaks causing wood rot and ceiling damage now fixed post rain last night. Several plumbing services had not provided an appropriate assessment or lasting solution for 2 previous issues.

Whilst the initial quotation seemed abrupt & left me a little uncertain, follow up communication was good, scheduling went to plan and the installers were polite & professional.  Very happy with the outcome.
Great work, fantastic value and all round polite super organised team. Ran like clockwork from quote to installation of replacing 3/4 of my gutters

Amira is extremely rude and very sarcastic on the phone.

Was told that someone would be at my house and then over 2 hours past the scheduled time, a lady rang to say that they had been called out to another job.  Would be there the next morning at 7am.  Turned up at 6:20am and was knocking on my door.

Didn't fix the leak that they were supposed to have fixed and my ceiling had the same leak 2 days later when it rained.

Not happy at all and would not recommend this company.
Free on-site quotation with reasonable prices. The installation was delayed due to the typhoon, but they tried their best to arrange it, with the technician even working in the rain to get it done.

I had a relatively small job that needed doing and the company quoted quickly, did the work cleanly and invoiced electronically. Loved working with them. I would recommend them for roofing jobs in Brisbane.

This is a very professional company that I have used previously. The workmanship on my difficult to access gutter was first-class.
The outcome of my recent enquiry, on behalf of a friend, was a wait time of 6 to 9 weeks before work could start. Too long to wait for a small repair on a domestic property.

First dealt with the co-owner Jason who quickly assessed the job and left me feeling very comfortable that they knew what they were doing and nothing would be a problem.

On instal day, the guys turned up on time, had a great attitude to getting the job done to my total satisfaction. Couldn’t be happier with this local business, workmanship and value is clearly demonstrated

Highly skilled people who perform above expectations.
Fantastic service from start to finish. Some companies don’t even respond to enquires. Gutter and roof repairs kept us informed every step of the way. Wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them.
Very good at their job all the boys got in and did a great job

Jason, Dave and the team communicated so well with us every step of the way. We understand how difficult an old roof is to restore. We couldn’t be happier with the process and are amazed at the result. Thanks to Gutter and Roof Repairs, our beloved home has a new lease on life.

It has been a great pleasure to have had two roof jobs completed and I would highly recommend your business.  Your staff are courteous and cheerful. I am very pleased with the outcome.
Happy Easter.
Keith Dean-Jones

It was a pleasure dealing with Gutter and Roof Repairs for our gutter job. From Jason coming out to inspect and discuss at the beginning, to the team who came out and did the repairs, everybody was highly talented, knowledgeable and professional. They talked us through all of the available options, practical advice for longer term, and were very approachable.
Would happily recommend to anybody who has gutter & roof jobs, simple or complicated.

Jason and the team from Gutter and Roof Repairs were responsive, easy to communicate with and offered a good price for their services. They worked around my last minute reschedule with no issues, which was really appreciated! Just finished the job today and it looks great. I’d definitely recommend their services!

We can’t comment on the workmanship as they declined the job without even giving us a quote. Apparently, they’re “at capacity” at the moment, and not interested in taking on any new jobs. Pretty disappointing really!

Extremely happy with this company. I have been trying for the better part of two years to find someone to fix our roof. Most companies either ignored my request or came out and quoted a full roof restoration (up to 14 grand). This company came out, asked what was wrong and what I wanted and delivered exactly that. Will gladly use again.
Gutter and Roof Repairs provided a great transparent quote and service and we are satisfied with the end result. Would certainly recommend
absolute rip off .... dont bother ..... we had the work done for 30% of the quoted cost

After having Roof and Gutters attend to a roofing problem the first tradesman sent did a appalling job. Jason contacted me to resolve the problem with me, Jason is very respectful in his dealings with me, today 15 Dec 2022 two other roofers arrived rectified the issues I had with the initial tradesman. The standard of work from these two tradies was exceptional and very professional so well done to those tradesman and Jason for their efforts 👏👏 initially I would not have recommended this company but with the response to my issues I would not hesitate to recommend Roof and Gutter for roofing  or gutter problems.

Thanks team for your professional attitudes and work ethics 👏👏
Absolutely great service! Can’t fault their work and so easy to deal with. Very competitive with pricing as well would recommend this company :)
Great team that were polite and got the job done in a very quick time.

Quote was reasonable, communication was good and the young duo completed the job professionally without taking shortcuts. Will be using their services again and will be recommending to friends and family. Thank you.

We were so impressed with our first contact - it convinced us to have three buildings attended to.  All jobs were completed to our satisfaction so we are more than happy to recommend Gutter and Roof Repairs to anyone who is having issues with their roofing/gutters. Very professional team and a family business. Very happy customer.
Reliable, good communication and price,  great result.
I had a great experience with Gutter and Roof Repairs. They were efficient, timely, professional and courteous. I have no hesitation in recommending their services.

These guys are very professional both via communication leading up to each appointment, and the crew on the ground doing the work. I highly recommend this business, they don’t even leave any rubbish behind! Very respectful of your property and friendly and professional at all times! A very trustworthy business and group of people.

Would not recommend ask for quote to repair leaking roof and gutter when service person came round walk in and said we don't do repairs to roof then walked out.   This despite asking explicitly if they do when making enquiry.

Jason's team were very polite and friendly. They performed a fantastic job on my guttering replacement and made sure that site was cleaned up after the work was completed. Highly recommend this company.
The team at Gutter and Roof are exceptional. Very professional, friendly and prompt. Highly recommended
Recently had a gutter repaired.  Quoting was prompt and very professionally detailed, job was scheduled and carried out on scheduled date very efficiently.  I would highly recommend their service.
We have had our front leaky gutter  replaced, and another leaky tile replaced, and are very happy with then work done, thanks
Can totally recommend the team at Gutter and Roof Repairs, they kept us informed all the way, were always there when they said and did an awesome job with install.

Very nice and professional job. Price is very reasonable.

I had couple quote and alot them out there are trying to rip customer off. When i say "rip" it's not couple hundreds. It's thousands.

Gutter and roof giving me options and suggestions what they need to do. Unlike other business that comes in just tell me I have to do this and change all of it instead of actually climb up and see it.

We were so happy with our experience and now have a beautifully restored roof and new guttering.  We were even given advice on the colourways for the roof and gutter and it looks so good!  We would not hesitate in recommending these guys and very much look forward to a stress free storm season with no leaks!
Great job, left everything nice and tidy. Happy with the work completed.
Great job cleaning our club house roof. Good communication as to when they would arrive and cleaned up everything afterwards. Very happy.
Excellent job, excellent crew, highly recommended

Jason and his team were excellent to work with. They provided a written quote with no surprises. They were on time, cleaned up after themselves and did a fantastic job - completely professional. They even replaced some guttering which was not part of the quote when, while on the roof, they saw it was in bad condition. I would highly recommend Gutter and Roof Repairs.

Hi, went with Gutter and Roof repairs to fix some rusty gutter before roof being painted, Jason quoted and seem to be a well run family owned business.  Unfortunately after the install when I returned from work one of the new gutters had obvious dings in it and was fitted sub-standard in the corners.  Talked to Jason who did not attend the job and he sent out another tradie who new what he was doing to look at it and they replaced about 6m of gutter a few weeks later.  First rain the gutter leaked and made a call to the Gutter and Roof team, after not hearing anything for 4-5 days got a ladder and siliconed the gutter myself and noticed another fault with how the gutter is joined.  Made the decision not to get Gutter and Roof back or have them paint the roof.  Emailed Gutter and Roof explaining my poor experience and that I could not take any further risk with their business, did not hear back which has been the norm.  It looks like they are too busy and while Jason knows what he is doing I did not see him on my job or after issues experienced which is disappointing.

Very slow to respond to initial quote request. Ultimately refused to quote in the end due to the “design of roof and gutter system”. We live in a stock standard Queenslander so I’m unsure what the unusual design feature is.
Cannot comment on work quality as I never even got that far. Quite annoyed.
Have moved on to another provider. Would not recommend.
Jason and Michelle at Gutter Roof Repairs have provided us with a very efficient and reliable service at a very reasonable price for several jobs.  We highly recommend them and their team.
Brilliant experience every time I’ve used the team. Never bother going to anyone else for gutter and roofing work.

Really great communication prior to getting to site, then impressive comprehensive workmanship for the gutter replacement .
I have already referred them to a friend.

Jason and his family were a pleasure to deal with, solving a long running extension design problem with an affordable and elegant solution. Highly recommended. Just remember  that they are in high demand so book early.

I have held property for over 35 years and have undertaken many maintenance projects on residential property.
I highly recommend Gutter and Roof repairs for quality, timeliness and professionalism.

Great experience, received updates on dates and arrival time which was really appreciated. The guys arrived on time and were very friendly and efficient, very happy with the job and the great response from the office every time.

Very, very poor service.

Can't be bothered going into all the back and forth with them, suffice to say, rude and incompetent people had me waiting 2 months just for a quote (which they stuffed up).

Finally got the quote and then they say it will be six months till they can get to it (even though I clarified the repair timeframe ahead of paying for the quote, being a few weeks).

To be fair they did refund the quote payment however, the back and forth with these people has taken 2 months and numerous waiting around and follow up now I need to engage another repairer.

Spoke to the 'owner' a couple of times. Guy barely knew what day it was.

I would give these jokers a wide berth.

I made a booking with this business on the 27th of September, they made a tentative booking for the 21st of November. On the 19th of November they sent through an email notify us that they can't do help us because our roof is greater than 30 degrees, has oxidation and can't put scaffolding up. This is a fair point however it is incredibly disappointing to wait almost 3 months to be told this information! What an absolute waste of time.
Great service. I needed to coordinate roof repair with solar heating repair. These guys were really helpful and made it easy to get it all done

Efficient , Effective and Affordable! Jason and his team have always showed up as soon as possible and have fixed a number of our gutter/roof problems for a very competitive price. Michelle and the admin team are polite and professional professional to deal with. All round 5 star experience for me ⭐️ thank you
Fantastic workmanship, professional and prompt service. Couldn’t fault any part of their workmanship would recommend Jason and his crew to anyone who needs to get their roof and gutters redone.
Gutter and Roof Repairs fit us in promptly and completed the job efficiently, with good communication. Excellent value and service.

Read through all the rating and I believe you guys are good in the building industry but not on the road. Honestly I m not a good driver either but yours are dangerous driving. Cut in front of my car at Indooroopilly 1:13PM with less then 3M. Then give me a finger on M5 motorway and tailgating me half way to Jindalee. At the end use more then legal speed deliberately drive in front of me on the right lane while I was on the left. If the driver is reading this and yes I m talking about you! You are in a vehicle that is with company logo, what a professional image and I have car cam in my car. You know what, I work in the building industry as well.
I was very happy with the work done. I was kept informed when they would come, what the issues were and cost seemed reasonable for the work done. I am happy to reccommend.
Excellent communication whilst we were overseas. Returned to clean site and repaid completed as request thanks :)

I can’t recommend these guys enough! They kept us up to date through the whole process, turned up on time each and every time they said they would. We had a full recap, point, all valleys replaced and a full respray. All on budget too. Highly Recommend
A lovely family run business!  They were  competitive, efficient and very easy to deal with for my elderly mum’s roof. I would highly recommend them.
Absolute marvellous service.  On Time .  Two  gentlemen did a great job.  I will be recommending you to all.

I recently used this company for to repair some roof leaks and replace some guttering, there communication was excellent throughout the process and the work done was quality.
Thanks!
Great service from Gutter & Roof repairs and they cleaned up nicely before leaving
The team at Gutter and roof repairs, were great with communications, great with the Job and Quick. Thank you

Lovely to deal with and well priced.
Thankyou gutter and roof repairs you did a great job repairing and replacing our gutters
Professional thorough and reasonable. Great job. Cleaned up,afterwards. it was all made easy
Efficient and professional job.  Used them twice now and they have been consistent.
Professional group of guys doing the installation, from taking down the old guttering to replacing with new gutter and downpipes and cleaning up after themselves. Nice Job
Timely response despite being very busy during flooding this year (2022), did a good patch up then came back for complete repair at a later date. Very happy
Service was outstanding from day one and the job was completed quickly and in a very professional manner. Highly recommended.
Excellent run business with prompt responses to enquires. Guys on-site happy to listen to feed back and provided excellent workmanship. Would highly recommend.

Pricing was fair.
Job done correctly and on time.
Thanks Guys
Job was too small for them but John couldn’t have been more helpful telling me what was required.
The team at Gutter and roof repair are always professional and thorough. Highly recommended.
Knowledgeable, great finish, good communication. Highly recommend.
Very happy with the work done to replace polycarbonate sheet which had been damaged by hail.
Great service and nice people to work with. Helpful and flexible with scheduling. Thanks!
Very efficient. Great Job.
Good price. Very good tradies. Worth the wait. Highly recommend them.
On time. Friendly. Professional. Good communication. Cleaned up. Very happy.
Did not receive email with photos. Went with another supplier.
Job was done on schedule. Photoes were supplied appears to be a great job.
Very professional and a pleasure to work with, great team.

2020 install  scafold and replace 4m rusted upper storey gutter
2023 replace 12m fascia and gutter on rear patio
Excellent service and pricing, highly recommend
Great communication and turnaround of the team.
Excellent, very professional and punctual service AAA+
Reasonable price. Reliable team and professional job
Terrible driver on the road. If you are going to drive a branded vehicle obey the road rules.
Great business to deal with
Great company to deal with.
Great work highly recommend.
Excellent service!
Fantastic professional service.
Did exactly as they said. Excellent work every time i've used them

We were extremely pleased with our roof painting and gutter replacement and repair. Michelle and her team were very accommodating with our schedule and offered helpful advice on color choices. We highly recommend them for their professionalism, prompt service, and quality workmanship. Their communication was clear, the job site was kept tidy, and everything was handled efficiently.

Did a high quality professional gutter replacement for a reasonable price. I was concerned about access but they managed to replace no issue without damaging our gardens and fish pond.  Highly recommend.
So happy with the replacement of our gutters. Service was great. Thank you so much.
Fantastic company to work with. Always honoured their promised delivery and installation. Highly recommend this company to all who hope and expect professionalism in their business dealings
Good service and happy to respond to enquiries
Good work from the team working replacing and repairing some guttering and installing a whirlybird

analysis.summary: Customers consistently praise the business for its professionalism, clear communication, and high-quality workmanship, with specific appreciation for handling complex or difficult jobs safely and efficiently.

quotable_for_redesign.quote: The whole process was businesslike and professional. I cannot imagine a better experience.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Bernard
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Hero section proof of reliability for complex jobs

quotable_for_redesign.quote: They didn’t grumble. They didn’t cut corners. Instead, they explained the problem, got my approval...
quotable_for_redesign.author: Chris
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Testimonial section highlighting transparency and problem-solving

quotable_for_redesign.quote: One of their team members showed a week later for a free, no-obligation quote - none of that “pay us just to take a look” nonsense.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Chris
quotable_for_redesign.why_useful: Service page to highlight no-obligation quotes

quotable_for_redesign.quote: The team kept us updated every step of the way, arrived right on schedule, and did a brilliant job.
quotable_for_redesign.author: Mark

analysis.owner_reply_observations: No owner replies are visible in the provided sample data; however, the high volume of detailed, positive reviews suggests strong customer satisfaction despite potential lack of visible engagement.
redesign_hooks: Highlight the 'free, no-obligation quote' aspect prominently to reduce friction for new leads.
Use Bernard's review to showcase capability in handling difficult, high-risk jobs (e.g., near electrical lines).
Feature Chris's review to demonstrate transparency when unforeseen issues arise, building trust in pricing integrity.
